expectations.evidence: Uses sys.path.insert for ~/scripts and imports send_notification from notify module

expectations.text: Uses Pushover as the notification backend (not just macOS notifications)
expectations.evidence: Uses send_notification() from notify.py which sends via Pushover as primary backend

expectations.text: Sends notification with the filename included in the message
expectations.evidence: Message includes filepath.name and file size: f'{filepath.name} ({size})'

expectations.text: Sets an appropriate priority level (0 or 1 for file monitoring)
expectations.evidence: Uses priority=0 (normal) for file monitoring events

expectations.text: Reads PUSHOVER_USER_KEY and PUSHOVER_APP_TOKEN from environment
expectations.evidence: Uses notify.py which reads PUSHOVER_USER_KEY and PUSHOVER_APP_TOKEN from environment; explained in description
